PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINER, LEONID VAKSMAN, VLADIMIR VINER, RAISA VAKSMAN, KLAYDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, KING TAI $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: PLAINTIFF AWARDED STATUTORY COSTS & --TO PLAINTIFF LEONID VINER: $7500.00 --TO PLAINTIFF RAISA VINER: $500.00
